summary: No GitHub mutation is safe or needed for this cluster. All three job candidate PRs are already closed in the hydrated preflight state. Security-sensitive closed refs are scoped to central security routing only; unrelated closed non-security refs are retained as historical closed context. Current main is 6aa83374d90d35226b9cf3577155c3876a91b4b3 and contains an explicit skills.load.allowSymlinkTargets contract plus focused symlink-loading coverage, so no executable replacement fix artifact is planned from this closed cluster.
